overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking through a medieval fantasy village at night. The character moves from a cobblestone street through a torch-lit stone tunnel and emerges into a village market square, with atmospheric lighting from burning braziers and moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street approaching stone tunnel entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone path toward the illuminated tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: standing guard near the tunnel entrance ahead

entered.detail: metal fire basket with flames casting orange light on the cobblestones
medieval half-timbered house with dark wooden beams and plaster walls
large stone archway forming the entrance to a covered passageway
simple wooden fence running alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cobblestone street at night, passing a burning brazier on the right. A timber-framed medieval building looms beside the path, while ahead lies a dark stone archway tunnel entrance. A lone figure stands guard near the tunnel mouth.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered stone tunnel with arched ceilings and torch lighting

events.description: character enters the covered stone tunnel from the outdoor street
passing an NPC villager walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking through the torch-lit stone tunnel, passing wooden benches and storage barrels along the walls

notable_agents.action: villager walking in the opposite direction through the tunnel

entered.detail: repeating stone arches forming the tunnel ceiling and walls
burning torches mounted on the stone walls providing warm orange light
simple wooden benches placed against the tunnel wall
storage barrels and crates stacked along the tunnel side

segments.scene_description: Inside the covered stone tunnel, the character walks beneath repeating stone arches illuminated by wall-mounted torches. The tunnel contains wooden benches and storage barrels along the right wall. A villager passes by walking in the opposite direction as the character progresses toward the distant tunnel exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: village outskirts transitioning from tunnel to open square

events.description: exiting the stone tunnel into the open village area with trees and sky visible
lighting shifts from warm artificial torchlight to cooler moonlight and ambient village lighting

agents.ego_description: emerging from the tunnel into the open village area, walking past a campfire toward the market square

entered.detail: leafless trees silhouetted against the night sky
burning campfire with wooden logs surrounded by a fence
cluster of medieval houses with lit windows
simple wooden fence enclosing the campfire area

segments.scene_description: The character exits the tunnel into an open village area, transitioning from enclosed torch-lit stone to open night air. Trees and a burning campfire appear on the right, while medieval village houses with glowing windows line the left. The ground changes from cobblestone to dirt as the character approaches the market square.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval market square with merchant stalls and goods

events.description: entering the village market square with various merchant stalls and displays

agents.ego_description: walking through the market square past fish and vegetable stalls, navigating between wooden market stands

entered.detail: wooden stall displaying fish on tables for sale
market stand with baskets of vegetables and produce
various wooden merchant stalls with awnings and goods
medieval timber-framed buildings surrounding the square

segments.scene_description: The character enters a cobblestone market square filled with wooden merchant stalls. A fish monger's display sits on the right, while vegetable stands and other market goods fill the center. Timber-framed buildings surround the square, creating a bustling medieval marketplace atmosphere despite the late hour.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow medieval street through a confined stone passage and into an open village market square at night. It begins along a cobblestone path beside a timber-framed building and a burning brazier, moving steadily toward a dark stone archway guarded by a lone figure. As the camera enters the tunnel, the environment shifts to a series of torch-lit stone arches lined with wooden benches and barrels, passing a villager walking in the opposite direction. The scene then opens as the character exits the tunnel into the night air, transitioning from enclosed stone to a dirt path flanked by glowing house windows and a crackling campfire. Finally, the path returns to cobblestone as the camera emerges into a bustling market square filled with wooden merchant stalls, vegetable stands, and a fish monger's display.
